title: mpi-ci start.sh: make CUBRIC_COMFY_ENABLED overridable (${VAR:-1}, line ~245 hardcodes export=1)
description: Found during MPI-197 round 3: start.sh line ~245 hardcodes `export CUBRIC_COMFY_ENABLED=1`, so a pod env override (CUBRIC_COMFY_ENABLED=0 for bare-launch debug) is impossible — had to side-launch ComfyUI on 8189 as a workaround. Change to `export CUBRIC_COMFY_ENABLED=${CUBRIC_COMFY_ENABLED:-1}` in c:/AI/Mpi/mpi-ci/cubric-vision-pod/start.sh (separate repo — edit with git -C). start.sh is R2 runtime-fetched at boot (publish-runtime.sh), no image rebuild needed. Low risk, debug-ergonomics only.
